docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DUONG, IEH DIEP, CUONG T SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
